content.text: Clean. Now similarly check the elements.py staged diff:

content.content:
diff --git a/app/bim_ai/elements.py b/app/bim_ai/elements.py
index ff86c202..662d66ed 100644
--- a/app/bim_ai/elements.py
+++ b/app/bim_ai/elements.py
@@ -2085,6 +2085,63 @@ class WindowLegendViewElem(BaseModel):
     parent_sheet_id: str | None = Field(default=None, alias="parentSheetId")
 
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# AST-V3-01 — Asset library entry + placed asset instance
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+
+class AssetParamEntry(BaseModel):
+    """One parameter definition in an asset's parametric schema."""
+
+    model_config = ConfigDict(populate_by_name=True, extra="ignore")
+    key: str
+    kind: Literal["mm", "enum", "material", "bool"]
+    default: Any
+    constraints: Any = None
+
+
+class AssetLibraryEntryElem(BaseModel):
+    """AST-V3-01 — searchable asset library entry with schematic-2D thumbnail."""
+
+    model_config = ConfigDict(populate_by_name=True, extra="ignore")
+    kind: Literal["asset_library_entry"] = "asset_library_entry"
+    id: str
+    asset_kind: Literal["family_instance", "block_2d", "kit", "decal", "profile"] = Field(
+        alias="assetKind", default="block_2d"
+    )
+    name: str
+    tags: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
+    category: Literal[
+        "furniture", "kitchen", "bathroom", "door", "window", "decal", "profile", "casework"
+    ]
+    discipline_tags: list[Literal["arch", "struct", "mep"]] = Field(
+        default_factory=list, alias="disciplineTags"
+    )
+    thumbnail_kind: Literal["schematic_plan", "rendered_3d"] = Field(
+        default="schematic_plan", alias="thumbnailKind"
+    )
+    thumbnail_width_mm: float | None = Field(default=None, alias="thumbnailWidthMm")
+    thumbnail_height_mm: float | None = Field(default=None, alias="thumbnailHeightMm")
+    param_schema: list[AssetParamEntry] | None = Field(default=None, alias="paramSchema")
+    published_from_org_id: str | None = Field(default=None, alias="publishedFromOrgId")
+    description: str | None = None
+
+
+class PlacedAssetElem(BaseModel):
+    """AST-V3-01 — a placed asset instance positioned on the canvas."""
+
+    model_config = ConfigDict(populate_by_name=True, extra="ignore")
+    kind: Literal["placed_asset"] = "placed_asset"
+    id: str
+    name: str
+    asset_id: str = Field(alias="assetId")
+    level_id: str = Field(alias="levelId")
+    position_mm: Vec2Mm = Field(alias="positionMm")

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# OUT-V3-01 — Live presentation URL
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# In-memory registry: token -> set of active WS connections for that presentation
_presentation_ws_sessions: dict[str, set[WebSocket]] = {}


class CreatePresentationBody(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(populate_by_name=True)
    page_scope_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, alias="pageScopeIds")
    allow_measurement: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowMeasurement")
    allow_comment: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowComment")
    expires_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="expiresAt")


@api_router.post("/models/{model_id}/presentations")
async def create_presentation(
    model_id: UUID,
    body: CreatePresentationBody,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
    user_id: str = Query(default="local-dev", alias="userId"),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """OUT-V3-01: create a presentation link token. Admin only."""
    from bim_ai.public_links import generate_link_token

    caller_role = await resolve_caller_role(session, model_id, user_id)
    if caller_role != "admin":
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Only admins can create presentations")

    now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
    link_id = secrets.token_urlsafe(16)
    token = generate_link_token()

    link_record = PublicLinkRecord(
        id=link_id,
        model_id=str(model_id),
        token=token,
        created_by=user_id,
        created_at=now_ms,
        expires_at=body.expires_at,
        is_revoked=False,
        display_name="presentation",
        open_count=0,
    )
    session.add(link_record)
    await session.commit()

    url = f"/p/{token}"
    return {
        "id": link_id,
        "modelId": str(model_id),
        "token": token,
        "pageScopeIds": body.page_scope_ids,
        "allowMeasurement": body.allow_measurement,
        "allowComment": body.allow_comment,
        "expiresAt": body.expires_at,
        "createdAt": now_ms,
        "isRevoked": False,
        "openCount": 0,
        "url": url,
    }


@api_router.get("/models/{model_id}/presentations")
async def list_presentations(
    model_id: UUID,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """OUT-V3-01: list non-revoked presentation links for a model."""
    res = await session.execute(
        select(PublicLinkRecord).where(
            PublicLinkRecord.model_id == str(model_id),
            PublicLinkRecord.is_revoked.is_(False),
            PublicLinkRecord.display_name == "presentation",
        )
    )
    records = res.scalars().all()
    return {
        "presentations": [
            {
                "id": r.id,
                "modelId": r.model_id,
                "token": r.token,
                "createdBy": r.created_by,
                "createdAt": r.created_at,
                "expiresAt": r.expires_at,
                "isRevoked": r.is_revoked,
                "openCount": r.open_count,
            }
            for r in records
        ]
    }


@api_router.post("/models/{model_id}/presentations/{link_id}/revoke")
async def revoke_presentation(
    model_id: UUID,
    link_id: str,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
    user_id: str = Query(default="local-dev", alias="userId"),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """OUT-V3-01: revoke a presentation link and close active WS sessions. Admin only."""
    caller_role = await resolve_caller_role(session, model_id, user_id)
    if caller_role != "admin":
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Only admins can revoke presentations")

    res = await session.execute(
        select(PublicLinkRecord).where(
            PublicLinkRecord.id == link_id,
            PublicLinkRecord.model_id == str(model_id),
        )
    )
    link_record = res.scalars().first()
    if link_record is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Presentation not found")

    now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
    link_record.is_revoked = True
    await session.commit()

    # Push revoke notification to all active WS sessions for this token
    token = link_record.token
    active_sockets = _presentation_ws_sessions.pop(token, set())
    for ws in list(active_sockets):
        try:
            await ws.send_json({"type": "revoked"})
            await ws.close(code=4403)
        except Exception:
            pass

    return {"revokedAt": now_ms}


@api_router.get("/p/{token}")
async def resolve_presentation_token(
    token: str,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """OUT-V3-01: resolve a presentation token (no auth required)."""
    now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
    res = await session.execute(
        select(PublicLinkRecord).where(PublicLinkRecord.token == token)
    )
    link_record = res.scalars().first()

    if link_record is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Presentation not found")

    if link_record.is_revoked:
        return {"status": "revoked"}

    if link_record.expires_at is not None and link_record.expires_at < now_ms:
        return {"status": "revoked"}

    try:
        from sqlalchemy import update as sa_update

        await session.execute(
            sa_update(PublicLinkRecord)
            .where(PublicLinkRecord.id == link_record.id)
            .values(open_count=PublicLinkRecord.open_count + 1)
        )
        await session.commit()
    except Exception:
        pass

    try:
        model_uuid = UUID(link_record.model_id)
    except ValueError:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Model not found")

    row = await load_model_row(session, model_uuid)
    if row is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Model not found")

    doc = Document.model_validate(row.document)
    elements_wire = {k: v.model_dump(by_alias=True) for k, v in doc.elements.items()}
    return {
        "status": "ok",
        "modelId": str(row.id),
        "revision": doc.revision,
        "elements": elements_wire,
        "violations": violations_wire(doc.elements),
        "wsUrl": f"/api/p/{token}/ws",
        "presentation": {
            "id": link_record.id,
            "displayName": link_record.display_name,
            "openCount": link_record.open_count + 1,
        },
    }


@api_router.websocket("/p/{token}/ws")
async def presentation_ws(
    websocket: WebSocket,
    token: str,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> None:
    """OUT-V3-01: WebSocket endpoint for live presentation refresh."""
    res = await session.execute(
        select(PublicLinkRecord).where(PublicLinkRecord.token == token)
    )
    link_record = res.scalars().first()

    if link_record is None or link_record.is_revoked:
        await websocket.accept()
        await websocket.send_json({"type": "revoked"})
        await websocket.close(code=4403)
        return

    await websocket.accept()

    # Register in the per-token session set
    _presentation_ws_sessions.setdefault(token, set()).add(websocket)

    # Subscribe to the model's hub so canvas changes arrive as broadcasts
    hub: Hub = websocket.app.state.hub
    model_id = link_record.model_id
    hub.subscribe(model_id, websocket)

    try:
        while True:
            data = await websocket.receive_text()
            _ = data
    except WebSocketDisconnect:
        pass
    finally:
        hub.unregister(websocket)
        sessions = _presentation_ws_sessions.get(token)
        if sessions:
            sessions.discard(websocket)
            if not sessions:
                _presentation_ws_sessions.pop(token, None)
PYEOF

message.content: This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation. Summary: 1. Primary Request and Intent: The user requested implementation of `spec/v3-prompts/wp-045.md` — WP-045 OUT-V3-01: Live presentation URL — refreshable + revocable + public-link. This involves: - A `PresentationLink` data model (Python + TypeScript) - Three REST API routes: `POST /api/models/{id}/presentations`, `GET /api/models/{id}/presentations`, `POST /api/models/{id}/presentations/{linkId}/revoke` - Public routes `GET /api/p/{token}` (no auth) and `WS /api/p/{token}/ws` - "Share live presentation" button in TopBar (disabled when no Page elements) - `SharePresentationModal` with scope chooser, toggles, expiry, copy-link, revoke table - `PresentationViewer` standalone React route at `/p/:token` with WS live refresh + revoke overlay - Tests in `app/tests/test_out_v3_01.py` covering all acceptance criteria - Commit to branch `feat/v3-out-v3-01-live-web-link`, no PR 2. Key Technical Concepts: - FastAPI routes on `api_router` (prefix `/api`) + WebSocket routes - `PublicLinkRecord` SQLAlchemy model reused for presentation tokens (with `display_name="presentation"` discriminator) - `generate_link_token()` from `bim_ai.public_links` - Pydantic discriminated union (`Element` type with `kind` discriminator) in `elements.py` - In-memory `_presentation_ws_sessions: dict[str, set[WebSocket]]` for token-scoped WS tracking - Hub broadcast subscription pattern (`hub.subscribe(model_id, websocket)`) - No hex literals in TSX files — CSS custom properties (`--color-*`, `--text-sm`, `--color-surface-2`) - Git worktree/multi-branch environment causing branch switching issues between Bash invocations - Selective staging to avoid including other WP changes 3. Files and Code Sections: - **`app/bim_ai/elements.py`** (modified via Python script) - Added `PresentationLinkElem` class before `VoidCutElem` - Added `PresentationLinkElem` to the `Element` Annotated union ```python class PresentationLinkElem(BaseModel): """OUT-V3-01 — live presentation URL token persisted as a document element.""" model_config = ConfigDict(extra="ignore", populate_by_name=True) kind: Literal["presentation_link"] = "presentation_link" id: str model_id: str = Field(alias="modelId") page_scope_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, alias="pageScopeIds") token: str permission: Literal["viewer"] = "viewer" allow_measurement: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowMeasurement") allow_comment: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowComment") expires_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="expiresAt") created_at: int = Field(alias="createdAt") revoked_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="revokedAt") ``` - In the union (line ~2182): `| PresentationLinkElem,` - **`packages/core/src/index.ts`** (modified — but staged diff currently has wrong content) - Added after `PublicLink` type (around line 1763-1786): ```ts // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // OUT-V3-01 — Live presentation link // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- export type PresentationLink = { kind: 'presentation_link'; id: string; modelId: string; pageScopeIds: string[]; token: string; permission: 'viewer'; allowMeasurement: boolean; allowComment: boolean; expiresAt?: number; createdAt: number; revokedAt?: number; }; ``` - PROBLEM: Current staged diff for this file shows OTHER WP changes (AST-V3-01 adding `asset_library_entry`/`placed_asset` to ElemKind, MRK-V3-03 adding `SheetAnchor` and `sheet_comment_chip`) but NOT PresentationLink. Needs fixing before commit. - **`app/bim_ai/routes_api.py`** (appended via bash heredoc at end of file, ~line 2271+) - Added `_presentation_ws_sessions: dict[str, set[WebSocket]] = {}` - Added `CreatePresentationBody` Pydantic model - Added `POST /api/models/{model_id}/presentations` → `create_presentation()` - Added `GET /api/models/{model_id}/presentations` → `list_presentations()` - Added `POST /api/models/{model_id}/presentations/{link_id}/revoke` → `revoke_presentation()` — also pushes `{"type": "revoked"}` to active WS sessions and closes them - Added `GET /api/p/{token}` → `resolve_presentation_token()` — returns `{"status": "revoked"}` (HTTP 200) if revoked, else model snapshot with `wsUrl` - Added `WS /api/p/{token}/ws` → `presentation_ws()` — subscribes to hub, registers in `_presentation_ws_sessions` - **`packages/web/src/workspace/TopBar.tsx`** (modified via Python scripts) - Extended `TopBarProps` interface with: ```ts /** OUT-V3-01: true when at least one Page exists in the model. */ hasPages?: boolean; /** OUT-V3-01: callback to open the SharePresentationModal. */ onSharePresentation?: () => void; ``` - Extended `TopBar` function destructuring and `TopBarRight` props/signature - Added button in `TopBarRight` before command palette button: ```tsx ``` - **`packages/web/src/collab/SharePresentationModal.tsx`** (created — 381 lines) - Props: `{ modelId, open, onClose, pages? }` - Sections: scope chooser (All pages checkbox + per-page checkboxes), viewer permissions (allowMeasurement, allowComment toggles), expiry date picker, "Copy link" button (POST to API then clipboard), active presentations list with Revoke buttons - Uses `--color-surface-2`, `--color-border`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-accent`, `--color-destructive`, `--text-sm` tokens throughout — no hex literals - **`packages/web/src/viewer/PresentationViewer.tsx`** (created — 208 lines) - Props: `{ token: string }` - On mount: `GET /api/p/{token}` → shows revoked state or renders canvas - Opens `WS /api/p/{token}/ws`; on `snapshot_update`/`delta` re-fetches; on `revoked`/4403 shows "Presentation revoked" overlay - No editing affordances - `PresentationBanner` at top: "Shared by [name]" / "Live presentation (read-only)" + "Sign in to edit →" link - Uses CSS custom property tokens only - **`app/tests/test_out_v3_01.py`** (created — 274 lines) - Stub FastAPI app with in-memory store (same pattern as `test_public_links_route.py`) - 15 tests across 5 classes — ALL PASSING: - `TestCreatePresentation`: creates token+url, 404 unknown model, empty pageScopeIds accepted, pageScopeIds persisted, unique tokens - `TestResolvePresentationToken`: returns model snapshot, returns revoked status when is_revoked, increments open_count, 404 unknown token - `TestRevokePresentation`: sets is_revoked=True, 404 unknown link - `TestListPresentations`: lists non-revoked, excludes revoked - `TestPresentationWebSocket`: WS connects for valid token, WS sends `{"type": "revoked"}` message for revoked token 4. Errors and Fixes: - **Linter/Prettier reformatting breaking Edit tool**: The PostToolUse hook runs Prettier after every file edit, which modifies the file. Subsequent Edit calls fail with "File has been modified since read". Fix: switched to Python scripts via Bash tool for complex multi-section edits, and used `cat >>` (heredoc append) for routes. - **Branch switching chaos between Bash invocations**: Each Bash invocation creates a new shell process. `.git/HEAD` was changed between invocations by some background process. The initial `git checkout main && git checkout -b feat/v3-out-v3-01-live-web-link` created the branch from `feat/v3-can-v3-01-line-weight-hierarchy` (not main) because `git checkout main` didn't persist to subsequent shells. Fix: always run `git checkout feat/v3-out-v3-01-live-web-link` at the start of each Bash command that needs to be on the correct branch. - **My edits being lost on branch switch**: When `git checkout feat/v3-out-v3-01-live-web-link` was run, it reset tracked files (elements.py, routes_api.py, TopBar.tsx, index.ts) back to that branch's HEAD, losing my edits. New/untracked files (test file, new TSX files) were also lost because they had been staged. Fix: re-applied all edits using Python scripts and bash heredocs; recreated new files. - **Staged index.ts contains wrong WP changes**: After branch switch and re-staging, `git diff --staged packages/core/src/index.ts` shows changes from AST-V3-01 (adding `asset_library_entry`, `placed_asset` to ElemKind) and MRK-V3-03 (adding `SheetAnchor`, `sheet_comment_chip`) but NOT PresentationLink.     Three more fields silently stripped by coerceElement during snapshot
    hydration:
    
    - window.outlineKind (KRN-12, allows 'gable_trapezoid' for slope-
      following window tops)
    - window.attachedRoofId (KRN-12, the roof whose slope drives the
      trapezoidal top)
    - door.operationType (KRN-13, allows 'sliding_double' for the loggia
      + dormer-deck sliding doors)
    - door.slidingTrackSide (KRN-13, 'wall_face' or 'in_pocket')

    window in the loggia recess rendered as a regular rectangle, and the
    loggia + dormer sliding doors rendered as standard swing doors. With

@api_router.delete("/models/{model_id}/milestones/{milestone_id}")
async def delete_milestone(
    model_id: UUID,
    milestone_id: str,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """VER-V3-02: delete a milestone by id."""
    res = await session.execute(
        select(MilestoneRecord).where(
            MilestoneRecord.id == milestone_id,
            MilestoneRecord.model_id == str(model_id),
        )
    )
    record = res.scalars().first()
    if record is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Milestone not found")
    await session.delete(record)
    await session.commit()
    return {"deleted": milestone_id}


@api_router.post("/models/{model_id}/tokens/diff")
async def tokens_diff(
    model_id: UUID,
    body: TknDiffRequest,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Return the structural diff between two TokenSequences."""
    from bim_ai.tkn import diff
    from bim_ai.tkn.types import TokenSequence

    row = await load_model_row(session, model_id)
    if row is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Model not found")
    seq_a = TokenSequence.model_validate(body.sequence_a)
    seq_b = TokenSequence.model_validate(body.sequence_b)
    delta = diff(seq_a, seq_b)
    return delta.model_dump(by_alias=True)

content.content:
@api_router.post("/models/{model_id}/public-links")
async def create_public_link_v3(
    model_id: UUID,
    body: CreatePublicLinkBodyV3,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
    user_id: str = Query(default="local-dev", alias="userId"),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """COL-V3-03: create a public link with optional expiry and password. Admin only."""
    from bim_ai.public_links import generate_link_token, hash_link_password

    caller_role = await resolve_caller_role(session, model_id, user_id)
    if caller_role != "admin":
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Only admins can create public links")

    now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
    link_id = secrets.token_urlsafe(16)
    token = generate_link_token()
    password_hash = hash_link_password(body.password) if body.password else None

    link_record = PublicLinkRecord(
        id=link_id,
        model_id=str(model_id),
        token=token,
        created_by=user_id,
        created_at=now_ms,
        expires_at=body.expires_at,
        password_hash=password_hash,
        is_revoked=False,
        display_name=body.display_name,
        open_count=0,
    )
    session.add(link_record)

    assignment_id = secrets.token_urlsafe(16)
    role_record = RoleAssignmentRecord(
        id=assignment_id,
        model_id=str(model_id),
        subject_kind="public-link",
        subject_id=token,
        role="public-link-viewer",
        granted_by=user_id,
        granted_at=now_ms,
        expires_at=body.expires_at,
    )
    session.add(role_record)
    await session.commit()

    return {
        "id": link_id,
        "modelId": str(model_id),
        "token": token,
        "createdBy": user_id,
        "createdAt": now_ms,
        "expiresAt": body.expires_at,
        "isRevoked": False,
        "displayName": body.display_name,
        "openCount": 0,
    }


@api_router.get("/models/{model_id}/public-links")
async def list_public_links(
    model_id: UUID,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """COL-V3-03: list non-revoked public links for a model."""
    res = await session.execute(
        select(PublicLinkRecord).where(
            PublicLinkRecord.model_id == str(model_id),
            PublicLinkRecord.is_revoked.is_(False),
        )
    )
    records = res.scalars().all()
    return {
        "links": [
            {
                "id": r.id,
                "modelId": r.model_id,
                "token": r.token,
                "createdBy": r.created_by,
                "createdAt": r.created_at,
                "expiresAt": r.expires_at,
                "isRevoked": r.is_revoked,
                "displayName": r.display_name,
                "openCount": r.open_count,
            }
            for r in records
        ]
    }


@api_router.post("/models/{model_id}/public-links/{link_id}/revoke")
async def revoke_public_link(
    model_id: UUID,
    link_id: str,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
    user_id: str = Query(default="local-dev", alias="userId"),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """COL-V3-03: revoke a public link and delete its RoleAssignment. Admin only."""
    caller_role = await resolve_caller_role(session, model_id, user_id)
    if caller_role != "admin":
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Only admins can revoke public links")

    res = await session.execute(
        select(PublicLinkRecord).where(
            PublicLinkRecord.id == link_id,
            PublicLinkRecord.model_id == str(model_id),
        )
    )
    link_record = res.scalars().first()
    if link_record is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Public link not found")

    link_record.is_revoked = True

    role_res = await session.execute(
        select(RoleAssignmentRecord).where(
            RoleAssignmentRecord.model_id == str(model_id),
            RoleAssignmentRecord.subject_kind == "public-link",
            RoleAssignmentRecord.subject_id == link_record.token,
        )
    )
    role_record = role_res.scalars().first()
    if role_record is not None:
        await session.delete(role_record)

    await session.commit()
    return {"revoked": link_id}


@api_router.get("/shared/{token}")
async def resolve_shared_token(
    token: str,
    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),
) -> dict[str, Any]:

class PublicLinkRecord(Base):
    __tablename__ = "public_links"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, primary_key=True)
    model_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        PGUUID(as_uuid=False), ForeignKey("bim_models.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), index=True
    )

1	"""OUT-V3-01 — Live presentation URL tests.
2	
3	Stub FastAPI app pattern (same as test_public_links_route.py).
4	No live DB required — in-memory presentation + model stores.
5	"""
6	
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	import time
10	import uuid
11	from typing import Any
12	
13	import pytest
14	from fastapi import FastAPI, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
15	from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
16	
17	from bim_ai.public_links import generate_link_token
18	
19	MODEL_ID = str(uuid.uuid4())
20	UNKNOWN_MODEL_ID = str(uuid.uuid4())
21	
22	
23	def _build_test_app() -> tuple[FastAPI, dict[str, Any]]:
24	    _models: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {
25	        MODEL_ID: {"revision": 1, "elements": {}, "violations": []}
26	    }
27	    _presentations: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
28	    _token_index: dict[str, str] = {}
29	
30	    app = FastAPI()
31	
32	    @app.post("/api/models/{model_id}/presentations")
33	    async def create_presentation(model_id: str, body: dict[str, Any]) -> Any:
34	        from fastapi import HTTPException
35	
36	        if model_id not in _models:
37	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Model not found")
38	
39	        now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
40	        link_id = uuid.uuid4().hex
41	        token = generate_link_token()
42	
43	        record = {
44	            "id": link_id,
45	            "modelId": model_id,
46	            "token": token,
47	            "pageScopeIds": body.get("pageScopeIds", []),
48	            "allowMeasurement": body.get("allowMeasurement", False),
49	            "allowComment": body.get("allowComment", False),
50	            "expiresAt": body.get("expiresAt"),
51	            "createdAt": now_ms,
52	            "isRevoked": False,
53	            "openCount": 0,
54	            "displayName": "presentation",
55	        }
56	        _presentations[link_id] = record
57	        _token_index[token] = link_id
58	        return {**record, "url": f"/p/{token}"}
59	
60	    @app.get("/api/models/{model_id}/presentations")
61	    async def list_presentations(model_id: str) -> Any:
62	        active = [
63	            p
64	            for p in _presentations.values()
65	            if p["modelId"] == model_id and not p["isRevoked"]
66	        ]
67	        return {"presentations": active}
68	
69	    @app.post("/api/models/{model_id}/presentations/{link_id}/revoke")
70	    async def revoke_presentation(model_id: str, link_id: str) -> Any:
71	        from fastapi import HTTPException
72	
73	        if link_id not in _presentations or _presentations[link_id]["modelId"] != model_id:
74	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Presentation not found")
75	
76	        now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
77	        _presentations[link_id]["isRevoked"] = True
78	        return {"revokedAt": now_ms}
79	
80	    @app.get("/api/p/{token}")
81	    async def resolve_presentation(token: str) -> Any:
82	        from fastapi import HTTPException
83	
84	        link_id = _token_index.get(token)
85	        if link_id is None:
86	            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Presentation not found")
87	
88	        record = _presentations[link_id]
89	        if record["isRevoked"]:
90	            return {"status": "revoked"}
91	
92	        now_ms = int(time.time() * 1000)
93	        if record["expiresAt"] is not None and record["expiresAt"] < now_ms:
94	            return {"status": "revoked"}
95	
96	        record["openCount"] += 1
97	        model = _models[record["modelId"]]
98	        return {
99	            "status": "ok",
100	            "modelId": record["modelId"],
101	            "revision": model["revision"],
102	            "elements": model["elements"],
103	            "violations": model["violations"],
104	            "wsUrl": f"/api/p/{token}/ws",
105	            "presentation": {
106	                "id": record["id"],
107	                "displayName": record["displayName"],
108	                "openCount": record["openCount"],
109	            },
110	        }
111	
112	    @app.websocket("/api/p/{token}/ws")
113	    async def presentation_ws(websocket: WebSocket, token: str) -> None:
114	        link_id = _token_index.get(token)
115	        if link_id is None or _presentations[link_id]["isRevoked"]:
116	            await websocket.accept()
117	            await websocket.send_json({"type": "revoked"})
118	            await websocket.close(code=4403)
119	            return
120	        await websocket.accept()
121	        try:
122	            while True:
123	                await websocket.receive_text()
124	        except WebSocketDisconnect:
125	            pass
126	
127	    return app, _presentations
128	
129	
130	@pytest.fixture()
131	def app_and_data() -> tuple[FastAPI, dict[str, Any]]:
132	    return _build_test_app()
133	
134	
135	@pytest.fixture()
136	def client(app_and_data: tuple[FastAPI, dict[str, Any]]) -> TestClient:
137	    app, _ = app_and_data
138	    return TestClient(app)
139	
140	
141	@pytest.fixture()
142	def presentations(app_and_data: tuple[FastAPI, dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, Any]:
143	    _, data = app_and_data
144	    return data
145

---

## Verbatim OUT-V3-01 tracker entry (§6 T4, line 1812)

**OUT-V3-01 — Live presentation URL — refreshable + revocable + public-link viewer**

**Status.** `next`. Ships after T3 link-share infra + CQ-01 lands. The B2 marquee output and Rayon copy item #8.

**Scope.** Hit "Share live presentation" → refreshable, revocable URL on clipboard; public viewer opens in a browser without an account; shows current Pages / Frames / Views state of the canvas; refreshes whenever the source canvas changes (websocket-driven). "Revoke" rotates the URL; existing readers see "presentation revoked." Per R-A §5: 10 000+ presentations published since soft launch — a top-of-funnel growth lever.

**Data model.** `{ kind: 'presentation_link'; id; modelId; pageScopeIds; token; permission: 'viewer'; allowMeasurement; allowComment; expiresAt?; createdAt; revokedAt? }`.

**Engine.** `POST /api/presentations/:modelId` issues a token-scoped read-only handle. Public route `GET /p/:token` resolves to a server-rendered viewer; viewer subscribes to a server-side websocket with the read-only token; updates stream as the canvas changes (CQ-01 makes this reliable). Rotating the token invalidates the WS session.

**UI.** Top bar → "Share live presentation" (inactive until at least one Page exists). Modal: scope chooser, measurement / comment toggles, optional expiry. "Copy link." Existing presentations list with "Revoke" per row. Public viewer is its own React route with no chrome editing affordances — only navigation, measurement, comment if enabled.

**Acceptance.** Create a 5-page Pages bundle; click "Share live presentation"; URL drops to clipboard; open in incognito → presentation visible without account; edit a wall on the source canvas → viewer refreshes within 500 ms; click "Revoke" → incognito viewer shows "presentation revoked" in <1 s. Brand-swap CI invariant on the public viewer (only Layer C changes).

**Effort.** L — 2–3 weeks. CQ-01 hard prerequisite.

**Cross-theme references.** T3 link-share infra (COL-V3-03 — hard prerequisite, now done); CQ-01 WebSocket robustness (hard prerequisite, now done); OUT-V3-02 (PPTX export walks same Frames state); OUT-V3-03 (branded PDF export shares same viewer chrome); D10 (Output is a feature, not an afterthought).

**Source.** R-A §5 + §6 (live presentation URL as top-of-funnel growth lever, 10k+ published); R-B §7 + §9 #5 (link-shareable canvas, frictionless packaging); COL-V3-03 infrastructure.

---

## Setup

```bash
git fetch origin && git checkout main && git pull --ff-only
git checkout -b feat/v3-out-v3-01-live-web-link
cd /Users/jhoetter/repos/bim-ai
python -c "from bim_ai.public_links import generate_link_token; print('public_links ok')"
uv sync && pnpm install
```

---

## Implementation tasks

### 1. Data model — Python (`app/bim_ai/document.py`)

Add `PresentationLink` to the `Document.elements` union:

```python
class PresentationLink(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(populate_by_name=True, extra="ignore")
    kind: Literal["presentation_link"] = "presentation_link"
    id: str
    model_id: str = Field(alias="modelId")
    page_scope_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, alias="pageScopeIds")
    token: str
    permission: Literal["viewer"] = "viewer"
    allow_measurement: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowMeasurement")
    allow_comment: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowComment")
    expires_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="expiresAt")
    created_at: int = Field(alias="createdAt")
    revoked_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="revokedAt")
```

### 2. TypeScript types (`packages/core/src/index.ts`)

```ts
export type PresentationLink = {
  kind: 'presentation_link';
  id: string;
  modelId: string;
  pageScopeIds: string[];
  token: string;
  permission: 'viewer';
  allowMeasurement: boolean;
  allowComment: boolean;
  expiresAt?: number;
  createdAt: number;
  revokedAt?: number;
};
```

### 3. API routes (`app/bim_ai/routes_api.py`)

Add three new routes under `api_router`:

- `POST /models/{model_id}/presentations` — create a `PresentationLink`; generate token via `generate_link_token()` from `public_links.py`; persist as a `PublicLinkRecord` with `display_name="presentation"`; return `{ token, url }`.
- `GET /models/{model_id}/presentations` — list non-revoked presentation links for the model.
- `POST /models/{model_id}/presentations/{link_id}/revoke` — set `is_revoked=True`; return `{ revokedAt }`.

Public viewer route (under a separate router, no auth required):

- `GET /p/{token}` — look up `PublicLinkRecord` by token; if `is_revoked` return `{ status: 'revoked' }`; else return model snapshot + websocket upgrade URL. Increment `open_count`.

### 4. WebSocket session for viewer (`app/bim_ai/routes_api.py` or new `app/bim_ai/presentation_ws.py`)

- `WS /p/{token}/ws` — validate token; if revoked close with code 4403 + message `"presentation revoked"`; else subscribe the socket to the model's existing CQ-01 change-broadcast bus. When the source canvas changes, push a `{ type: 'snapshot_update' }` message. Token rotation (revoke) must push `{ type: 'revoked' }` and close all active WS sessions for that token.

### 5. "Share live presentation" button (`packages/web/src/workspace/TopBar.tsx`)

```python
    model_id: str = Field(alias="modelId")
    page_scope_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, alias="pageScopeIds")
    token: str
    permission: Literal["viewer"] = "viewer"
    allow_measurement: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowMeasurement")
    allow_comment: bool = Field(default=False, alias="allowComment")
    expires_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="expiresAt")
    created_at: int = Field(alias="createdAt")
    revoked_at: int | None = Field(default=None, alias="revokedAt")
```

### 2. TypeScript types (`packages/core/src/index.ts`)

```ts
export type PresentationLink = {
  kind: 'presentation_link';
  id: string;
  modelId: string;
  pageScopeIds: string[];
  token: string;
  permission: 'viewer';
  allowMeasurement: boolean;
  allowComment: boolean;
  expiresAt?: number;
  createdAt: number;
  revokedAt?: number;
};
```

### 3. API routes (`app/bim_ai/routes_api.py`)

Add three new routes under `api_router`:

- `POST /models/{model_id}/presentations` — create a `PresentationLink`; generate token via `generate_link_token()` from `public_links.py`; persist as a `PublicLinkRecord` with `display_name="presentation"`; return `{ token, url }`.
- `GET /models/{model_id}/presentations` — list non-revoked presentation links for the model.
- `POST /models/{model_id}/presentations/{link_id}/revoke` — set `is_revoked=True`; return `{ revokedAt }`.

Public viewer route (under a separate router, no auth required):

- `GET /p/{token}` — look up `PublicLinkRecord` by token; if `is_revoked` return `{ status: 'revoked' }`; else return model snapshot + websocket upgrade URL. Increment `open_count`.

### 4. WebSocket session for viewer (`app/bim_ai/routes_api.py` or new `app/bim_ai/presentation_ws.py`)

- `WS /p/{token}/ws` — validate token; if revoked close with code 4403 + message `"presentation revoked"`; else subscribe the socket to the model's existing CQ-01 change-broadcast bus. When the source canvas changes, push a `{ type: 'snapshot_update' }` message. Token rotation (revoke) must push `{ type: 'revoked' }` and close all active WS sessions for that token.
